definitions: A device containing a mechanical fan that hangs above the stove or cooktop in the kitchen to remove airborne grease, combustion products, fumes, smoke, heat, and steam from the air.
An enclosure used in laboratories to limit exposure to hazardous or toxic fumes, vapors, or dusts.
examples: Turn on the ventilation hood while frying.
The laboratory ventilation hood requires an annual inspection.
A stainless steel ventilation hood was installed above the range.
